sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95617" key="sou=bos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σοῦβος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, an unknown animal, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:382" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.382</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.267</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
